description: A faithful mechanical pink panther Codex pet with a long sleepy face, slender toy-metal body, pearl pink enamel, and a laid-back cool expression.

idle.notes: Relaxed standing idle with tiny blink, slight head sway, and slow tail motion.

walk.notes: Directional walk rows for normal movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Subtle head tilt and side-looking observant loop.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased gesture with small paw lift and controlled expression.

sleep.notes: Main dozing loop with closed eyes, lowered head, and relaxed tail.

sit.notes: Dedicated seated rest loop stored in the spare atlas row.

probe.notes: Relaxed in-place busy or surveying loop without directional travel.

fluff.notes: Deeper sleepy slump used as a subdued extra rest state.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing walk rows rather than mirrored guesses.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, body, paws, and tail stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
